steps.title: Combine constants on the left side
steps.content:
Start with $(p+3)+8=10$.

Remove the parentheses and combine constant terms:
$$p + 3 + 8 = 10$$
$$p + 11 = 10$$

steps.title: Isolate p and solve
steps.content:
Subtract 11 from both sides:
$$p + 11 - 11 = 10 - 11$$
$$p = -1$$

That matches choice A — A is correct.
